🗂️
Study Planner Builder
Choose how you want to build your plan
ℹ️ What's the difference?
📚
Lecture-based planning
Set pace in lectures/day. Great for CA, professional exams with fixed syllabi. Track each lecture done vs pending.
⏱️
Hour-based planning
Set daily hours per subject. Ideal for flexible study schedules, revision, or when you prefer time-blocks over lecture counts.

Cloud Backup
Google Drive Backup 🔐 Admin
Auto-saves · Admin access required
⚠️ Clear All Data
Permanently deletes all accounts, sessions, tasks, homework, plans and profile data. App restarts fresh.
☁️
Google Drive Backup
Profiles saved as PDF cards in a Study Smart Profiles folder
📋 What's included in the PDF
✅ Unique ID & Username
✅ Gender · DOB & Age
✅ State & PIN Code
✅ Member Since date
✅ Profile photo
✅ User IP address
✅ Device name & model
✅ File named with Unique ID
🔒 Uses Google OAuth — Study Smart never stores your password. You can revoke access anytime from your Google Account.
✅
Connected
Google Drive linked
✂️ Set Photo
Drag to position · Pinch or slide to zoom

📚
Add Subject
Once added, subject can only be deleted — not edited
Subject Name *
Faculty / Teacher Name
Add to Section *
Upload Lecture PDF (optional · auto-parses lectures)
📄
Tap to upload or drag PDF here
Lecture titles & count auto-detected
💡 PDF Pattern Guide
Auto-detection works best when lectures are listed like:
✅ Lecture 1 – Introduction
✅ Lec 2: Cost of Capital
✅ Day 3. Audit Procedures
✅ 1. Chapter Name
✅ Session 4 – Topic
❌ Just random paragraphs
📌 Keywords detected: Lecture, Lec, Day, Session, Class, Unit, Chapter, Topic, Module, Part followed by a number.
📖 0 lectures
Total Lectures *
Auto-filled from PDF · or enter manually
📂
Add Custom Lecture Data (Folders)
▶
📌 Group lectures under folders (chapters/topics). Each lecture gets a name + duration (mins).
📂
Edit Lecture Data
Edit folders & lectures for this subject
📚
Add Subject
Name · Faculty · Chapters with duration
Subject Name *
Faculty / Teacher Name
Chapters * — with estimated study hours
📌 Add chapters with their estimated study hours. The total will be auto-set as this subject's hours in the selected section.
📊 Total Study Hours 0h
This will be set as the total hours for this subject in the current section.

Divide the current PDF. You can split at a page or extract a range.
Split mode
Page range (e.g. 1-3 or 1,4,6)

Will split into two equal halves and download both.
